notable_phrases: we've been constrained on the 14 pro and the 14 pro max
difficult to say what the mix will be until we can satisfy the demand
summary: Apple reported record quarterly revenue despite significant foreign exchange headwinds and supply constraints on iPhone 14 Pro models, while management expressed cautious optimism amid macro uncertainty and currency pressures.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2022 Q3; scores broadly stable QoQ.
